secondary.description: Safety Orange - Alerts, CTAs, High Visibility

usage_rules: Use Safety Orange (#FF5F00) ONLY for primary actions (Save, Submit, Bid) and critical alerts.
Use Deep Royal Blue (#003366) for headers, navigation, and primary branding.
Backgrounds should be 'Concrete' (off-white/light grey) in light mode to reduce glare, but high contrast.
Dark mode should use 'Gunmetal' (#0F172A) - not pure black.
Borders are CRITICAL. Use 1px solid borders (#E2E8F0) to define areas. No soft shadows.

grid_system.mobile_nav: Fixed bottom navigation with 4-5 key items

containers.card_style: rounded-sm border border-border bg-card text-card-foreground shadow-none

buttons.primary: bg-secondary text-white hover:bg-secondary/90 rounded-md font-bold uppercase tracking-wide shadow-sm h-12
buttons.secondary: bg-primary text-white hover:bg-primary/90 rounded-md font-medium h-12
buttons.outline: border-2 border-primary text-primary hover:bg-primary/10 rounded-md font-bold h-12

inputs.default: h-12 rounded-md border-2 border-input bg-background px-3 py-2 text-lg ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50
inputs.label: text-sm font-bold uppercase tracking-wide text-muted-foreground mb-1.5 block

cards.dashboard_widget: p-4 border border-border bg-white dark:bg-slate-800 rounded-sm flex flex-col justify-between h-full

navigation.mobile_bottom_bar: fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 h-16 bg-primary text-white flex justify-around items-center z-50 border-t border-primary-foreground/20
navigation.sidebar: hidden md:flex flex-col w-64 bg-slate-900 text-white h-screen fixed left-0 top-0 border-r border-slate-800

textures: Subtle noise overlay on dark backgrounds to simulate 'cast iron' or 'concrete'.
Diagonal stripe patterns (warning tape style) for danger zones or empty states.

icons.style: Stroke width 2px or 2.5px (Bold). No thin lines.
icons.usage: Use icons heavily for quick scanning (e.g., Wrench for Tools, Helmet for Safety).

accessibility.contrast: WCAG AAA for all text. High contrast is non-negotiable for outdoor use.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. INSTALL FONTS: Add the Google Fonts import to index.css immediately.
2. CONFIGURE TAILWIND: Update tailwind.config.js with the 'Rugged Industrial' colors and font families.
3. COMPONENT OVERRIDES: When using Shadcn components, override the default 'radius-md' with 'radius-sm' or 'radius-none' for a sharper, industrial look.
4. MOBILE FIRST: Design the navigation and forms for mobile screens first. Use full-width inputs and large buttons.
5. DATA DENSITY: For the 'Plumbing Formulas' and 'Job Material Lists', use dense tables with alternating row colors (zebra striping) for readability.
6. SAFETY TALKS: The AI Safety Talk page should look like a 'Daily Briefing' card - high importance, clear typography.
7. BLUEPRINTS: The Blueprint page needs a high-contrast PDF viewer wrapper.
8. TESTING: Add data-testid to every button, input, and link.
universal_guidelines: Avoid gradients on text. Keep it solid and high-contrast.
Do not use 'Inter' for headings. Use 'Barlow Condensed'.
Ensure all forms have client-side validation with clear error messages in Red/Orange.
Use 'Lucide-React' for icons. Bold stroke width.
